content:
## Problem Statement
## Design Principles

## Architecture

```
WRITE PATH (knowledge goes in)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Agent decision     в†’ corvia_write(source_origin: "repo:corvia") в†’ knowledge store
Human edits docs   в†’ git commit в†’ post-commit hook в†’ incremental re-index
Code changes       в†’ corvia ingest в†’ chunked + embedded в†’ knowledge store
Superpowers spec   в†’ hook enforces path в†’ saved to repo docs/ в†’ ingested

READ PATH (knowledge comes out)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Quick orientation  в†’ repo's README.md / ARCHITECTURE.md (curated, few files)
Deep exploration   в†’ corvia dashboard (graphed document reader)
Agent queries      в†’ corvia_search / corvia_ask via MCP (with filters)
Periodic health    в†’ corvia docs check (Aggregator findings in dashboard)
```
